tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the project's purpose and architecture.

tour.title: Project Configuration
tour.description: Review the project configuration files including package.json, tsconfig.json, and vite.config.ts to understand the build setup and dependencies.

tour.title: Application Entry Point
tour.description: Start from the main entry point and App.svelte to understand how the application boots and mounts.

tour.title: Core Data Layer
tour.description: Explore the data files and calculations that define game mechanics, buffs, and damage calculations.

tour.title: Game Engine
tour.description: Understand the core engine logic that processes builds, weapons, and enchantments.

tour.title: UI Components
tour.description: Explore the main UI components including damage analyzer, stat filters, and buff displays.

tour.title: Library Utilities
tour.description: Review the shared utilities, types, and constants that support the application.

tour.title: Modal Interfaces
tour.description: Explore the modal dialogs for selecting accessories, guilds, races, and weapon parts.

tour.title: State Management
tour.description: Understand how the application manages state and stores.

tour.title: Build System
tour.description: Review the build configuration and deployment setup.

project.name: voxlblade
project.description: A Svelte + TypeScript + Vite project for game damage calculations and build optimization
